brand.name: JAD2 TAWJIH

slimane.name: Slimane
slimane.greeting: Hello! I'm Slimane, your AI academic advisor for Morocco. I know every institution in the country. Tell me your Bac track or ask me anything to get started.
slimane.placeholder: Ask me anything about your studies...
slimane.disclaimer: Slimane is an AI — always verify official admission requirements before deciding.
xp.label: XP
level.label: Level
streak.label: Streak
step.grades.hint: Enter your grades out of 20. The more subjects you fill in, the more accurate our recommendations.
step.grades.tawjihi_note: Tawjihi formula: final grade = 75% × national score + 25% × regional score
step.profile.region_hint: Select your region first to choose your city
step.profile.xp_hint: This step earns you +15 XP — more than halfway there!

city.label: Your city
financial.label: Monthly family budget
financial.>15000.desc: UM6P, Al Akhawayn, all options open
consent.title: Data Protection
consent.text: Compatibility matching runs instantly in your browser. With your consent, your anonymised profile may be saved on our secure servers to improve recommendations — never shared with third parties without explicit opt-in. JAD2 TAWJIH is an independent guidance tool, not affiliated with any institution listed.
consent.checkbox: I accept the terms of use and understand that results are indicative and non-binding.
consent.retention: Data retained for a maximum of 24 months
consent.delete: Right to deletion at any time
results.title: Your personalised recommendations
results.no_matches: No perfect match? Here are solid alternatives:
results.disclaimer: These results are indicative. JAD2 TAWJIH is not a partner of any institution listed. Always verify official admission requirements on the institution's website or cursussup.gov.ma.
match.confidence.label: AI Confidence
optin.title: Application submission
optin.desc: You will be redirected to the official website of {{school}} to submit your application. JAD2 TAWJIH does not process any applications directly.
footer.disclaimer: Independent orientation tool. JAD2 TAWJIH is not a partner of any institution. Information is provided for guidance only.
hero.title: Your ideal school
hero.subtitle: Slimane, your AI advisor, analyses your Bac profile and recommends the best schools — ENSA, ENCG, ISCAE, UIR, UM6P and {{count}}+ more.
hero.badge.season: Tawjihi 2026 Results — Start your orientation now
how.label: Process
how.title: Your future in 3 steps
how.subtitle: A simple, gamified process. Less than 3 minutes for your complete orientation plan.

cpge.warning.title: Indirect admission — Preparatory Classes required
cpge.warning.desc: This school does not accept Baccalaureate holders directly. You must first complete 2 years of Preparatory Classes (CPGE — MP / PSI / TSI), then pass the National Common Examination (CNC). Your Bac alone is not enough to apply.
